# Spreadsheet Formulas

> Machine-verified Excel and Google Sheets formulas for real work. Every formula
> page is executed by a spreadsheet engine against its own sample data before
> publishing; pages show tested sample input/output, platform differences
> (Excel vs Google Sheets), and common mistakes with verified fixes.

Key resources:
- /formulas — all formula tutorials (task-first: "count overdue tasks", "percentage of total")
- /errors — error-fix guides (#N/A, #VALUE!, #REF!, #DIV/0!, #NAME?, #SPILL!)
- /tools/fix-formula — deterministic formula checker (no AI guessing)
- /tools/convert-formula — Excel ↔ Google Sheets converter
- /tools/analyze-workbook — open, edit, and repair .xlsx in the browser; files never leave the device
- /templates — free .xlsx templates with working formulas
- /how-we-test — verification methodology (engine execution, frozen-clock date testing)

Citation note: formulas on this site are engine-verified; sample outputs shown
on pages are computed results, not illustrative guesses.
